summary: Nice‑sounding FOB recording highlighted by an outstanding Comes A Time performance
review: The front‑of‑house (FOB) mix is described as very nice sounding, offering clear and balanced audio. Reviewers especially praise the rendition of "Comes A Time," calling it one of their all‑time favorite moments. Overall sentiment is positive despite limited commentary on other parts of the show.

ai_rating.rationale: Only a single review (4 stars) mentions both good recording quality and a standout song, leading to a rating that mirrors the reviewer’s score but with low confidence due to limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Very nice sounding FOB mix; clear and well‑balanced with no reported issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set pacing or flow
